strengths: 18+ years of fullstack experience with deep TypeScript/Node.js work at re:cinq, Optilyz, and RIDE Capital, exceeding the 6+ year requirement
Direct AI agent development experience — MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at current role
Strong testing and craftsmanship background: TDD practitioner, author of test libraries (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), ran TDD/Selenium courses
concerns: No Nest.js experience mentioned, a core framework in the primary stack
Limited evidence of recent React depth — frontend history leans heavily on Ember.js; React cited only at Optilyz
Kotlin absent and Java experience dated (robotics work 2016-2018); no explicit Vitest/Jest/Playwright mention
response.justification: The candidate clearly meets the experience bar with sustained TypeScript/Node.js product work (Optilyz pricing platform with React and MongoDB, RIDE Capital with GraphQL and TDD/CI/CD) and brings rare, directly relevant AI agent experience via MCP tooling at re:cinq. Cloud and container competency is evidenced by AWS CDK usage and Kubernetes deployment of GISCollective; testing expertise is exceptional, evidenced by authored test frameworks and TDD teaching, even though Vitest itself is not named. Database experience spans MongoDB, MySQL, and SQL. Gaps are framework-specific rather than fundamental: Nest.js is unmentioned, React exposure appears lighter than Ember, and Kotlin/Java is secondary-stack only with dated evidence. Security/auth practices are not explicitly cited. Given strong core competencies and learnable gaps, this is a solid fit for a senior IC role in internal automation tooling.
